positive: A central, stylized composition featuring a trio of abstract nature elements: a majestic mountain range with minimalist peaks, silhouetted by a crescent moon, intertwined with swirling bioluminescent floral patterns and a gentle, stylized river flowing through the valley. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and highly contrasting, utilizing deep indigo blues, celestial purples, and pops of neon cyan and soft gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau organic curves and modern vector graphic precision. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Strong contrast, flat color areas, thick outlines, perfect symmetry, clean silhouette, isolated subject on a transparent background.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, bad composition, low contrast, realistic photo, photorealism, messy lines, grain, gradients, dull colors
